title: Why We Switched to Solar — An Honest Look at Year One
body: We installed 24 panels on our workshop roof last June, and honestly the first three months were underwhelming. The monsoon clouds ate most of our output and the inverter app became a source of daily disappointment. But then October arrived. Our generation jumped to 410 kWh a month, the grid bill dropped to almost nothing, and by January we were exporting more than we used. The maths works out to roughly a six year payback, which is two years faster than the installer promised. Would we do it again? In a heartbeat — but we'd skip the premium panels and put that money into a bigger battery instead.
